description_long: This object is a classic CRT computer monitor with a boxy, angular rear housing and a flat, square display screen. The front features a prominent blue screen with white text, reminiscent of a Windows 'blue screen of death,' and is framed by a thick, light gray bezel. Below the screen, there are several small, round buttons and an LG brand logo, all situated on a slightly protruding lower bezel. The sides and back of the monitor are faceted and taper inward, giving the rear a geometric, almost sculpted appearance. The monitor sits on a wide, flat black base that provides stability. The overall construction suggests a combination of hard plastic for the casing and glass for the display, with internal electronic components.
description: A boxy, light gray CRT computer monitor with a thick bezel, blue error screen, and a black base. The front features control buttons and an LG logo below the display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the blue error screen, thick gray bezel, LG logo, and a row of control buttons on the lower bezel.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the monitor's deep, angular rear housing and the sloped black base, with no screen or buttons visible.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the faceted, geometric back of the monitor, showing the full depth and the wide base, with no visible ports or branding.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, displaying the angular rear and the sloped base, with no screen or controls visible.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, light gray, and flat with a matte finish, featuring slightly rounded corners and a smooth surface. It frames the display area with a uniform width and has a subtle contrast with the black base.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a wide, flat black base that extends beneath the monitor, providing stability. It appears to be made of hard plastic and is not visibly adjustable.
attribute_button_placement: A row of small, round buttons is located on the lower bezel, centered below the screen and grouped together.
attribute_brand_logo: An LG logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel, directly below the screen, in a contrasting color for visibility.
